content: Hi, I'm Dana. I'm a wedding planner and I've been really busy lately with wedding season in full swing. I'm also working on a side project, an online course about wedding planning.
Congratulations on your online course, Dana! That sounds like a lot of work. How's the course coming along, and what inspired you to create it?

Thanks! The course is going well, and I'm really excited to share my knowledge and experience with others. I've been in the wedding planning business for over 10 years, and I've learned so much along the way.
That's amazing. You must have seen some beautiful weddings over the years. Do you have any favorite venues or locations that you love working with?

I actually love working with outdoor venues, like beaches and gardens. There's something so romantic and beautiful about a wedding surrounded by nature. I've also been to some amazing destinations, like Hawaii and the Caribbean, for weddings.
That sounds incredible. As a wedding planner, you must have to be very organized and detail-oriented. Do you have any favorite tools or software that help you stay on top of things?
I actually love using Trello and Asana to keep track of my tasks and deadlines. It's really helpful to be able to visualize my workflow and stay organized.
Those are both great tools. I've heard that Trello is really visual and easy to use. Do you have any hobbies or activities that you enjoy in your free time, outside of wedding planning?

I love knitting and surfing. Knitting is really relaxing for me, and surfing is a great way to get some exercise and enjoy the outdoors. I've also been trying to get into travel blogging, and I've been writing about some of my favorite destinations.

That's really cool. Travel blogging sounds like a great way to share your experiences and adventures with others. Do you have any upcoming trips planned, or any favorite destinations that you always come back to?

I actually have a trip planned to Italy next month, and I'm really excited to explore the countryside and try some of the local cuisine. I've also been to some amazing destinations in Asia, like Japan and Thailand.
Italy is a beautiful country, and the food is amazing. I'm sure you'll have a great time. Do you have any favorite foods or dishes that you love to try when you're traveling?
I love trying new foods and drinks, and I'm always up for an adventure. I've tried some really interesting things, like fried insects and exotic fruits.

That's really adventurous of you. I'm sure you have some great stories and experiences to share. Thanks for chatting with me, Dana. I hope your online course goes well and you have a great time in Italy.
Thanks, it was great chatting with you too. I'm looking forward to my trip and to sharing my knowledge with others through my course.
You're welcome, Dana. I'm sure you'll do great. Don't hesitate to reach out if you need any more help or have any questions.
I will, thanks. Have a great day!
